hero.description: Find the right creators, collaborate directly, and measure real results without middlemen or surprises.

deals.title: Collaborate directly. No middlemen.
deals.desc: Clear partnerships with verified creators, from selection to payment.
deals.step1_desc: Describe your needs, define your criteria, and set your budget. Simple, fast, no endless forms.
deals.step2_desc: Check real statistics for each creator — followers, engagement, audience. All verified, none self-reported.
deals.step3_desc: Approve content at your own pace. Request edits if needed. You only pay for what you approve.

creators_teaser.desc: Filter by region, niche, platform, audience size, and engagement rate. Every data point is verified in real-time — never self-reported.
creators_teaser.overlay: Create an account to access the directory

why_vybe.title: Built for Algeria. From day one.
why_vybe.feat1_desc: Chargily for Algeria (CIB, BaridiMob, Dahabia), Stripe for the Gulf. No complicated transfers, no hidden fees.
why_vybe.feat2_desc: Creator stats are pulled directly from TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. What you see reflects reality.
why_vybe.feat3_desc: Arabic (with RTL support), French, and English. Your brief is always readable in your creator's language.

pricing.title: A plan tailored for every stage.
pricing.subtitle: Monthly billing · Save 20% with annual subscription
pricing.footer: No commitment. No hidden fees. Algerian brands see prices displayed in DZD.

testimonials.title: Trusted by brands
testimonials.t1_quote: In two weeks, we had 47 pieces of ready-to-use content — without sending a single message. The quality was outstanding.
testimonials.t2_quote: The creator directory alone is worth the subscription. In ten minutes, we identified verified profiles we would have never found otherwise.
testimonials.t3_quote: Before, I managed everything on WhatsApp. Now I post a brief and creators contact me directly. The process has become seamless.

cta.title: Ready to work with the right creators?
cta.desc: Create your account for free and post your first offer in minutes.

auth.testimonial_quote: Vybe completely changed how we scale our brand in Algeria. Finding the right creators has never been this seamless.

legal.content_placeholder: Legal content will be displayed here. The official documentation is currently being drafted.

waitlist.hero_desc: Join our exclusive waitlist. Whether you're a brand looking to grow your reach or a creator ready to collaborate, Vybe is your next step.
waitlist.no_spam: No spam, ever. We'll reach out on WhatsApp when your access is ready.
waitlist.success_desc: We'll reach out to {name} on WhatsApp when access opens.
waitlist.error_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.

creator_landing.hero_desc: Join Vybe to receive direct offers from top brands. Secure payments, local withdrawal methods, and total creative freedom.
creator_landing.f1_desc: Never worry about unpaid invoices again. Brands pay upfront, and funds are secured before you start creating.
creator_landing.f2_desc: Withdraw your earnings directly to your local bank account via Chargily (CIB/BaridiMob) or Stripe. Fast and hassle-free.
creator_landing.f3_desc: Say goodbye to middlemen. Communicate directly with brands, negotiate terms, and build long-term relationships.
creator_landing.w1_desc: Link your TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube securely. We pull your real stats so you never have to send a media kit again.
creator_landing.w2_desc: Brands find you in our verified directory and send direct collaboration offers with clear budgets and briefs.
creator_landing.w3_desc: Submit your content, get it approved, and withdraw your earnings directly to your local bank account.
creator_landing.integrations_desc: We use secure direct integrations to connect to social platforms. Your data is never self-reported, which builds ultimate trust with top brands.
creator_landing.faq1_q: Is there a minimum follower requirement?
creator_landing.faq1_a: Yes, you need at least 10,000 authentic followers on either TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube to join the creator directory.
creator_landing.faq2_q: Are there any fees for creators?
creator_landing.faq2_a: No, Vybe is 100% free for creators. Brands cover the platform fees, meaning you keep exactly what you agree to in the offer.
creator_landing.faq3_q: How do I withdraw my money?
creator_landing.faq3_a: Algerian creators can withdraw directly to their bank accounts via BaridiMob or CIB. Creators in the Gulf can withdraw via Stripe to their local bank accounts.
